titleStmt.title: SII 6.1170: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1170. (A.R. No. 365-III of 1899). ON THE BASE OF THE ASTHANA-MANDAPA; PROPER LEFT SIDE OF THE MAIN ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmaNmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣagetapavarāyaragaṁḍa yavanarājya
sthāpanācārya śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagarāna siṁhāsanārūḍuḍai pūrvadigvijayayātraku viccēśi
Uddagiri koṁḍavīḍu koṁḍapalli rājamahēṁdrāvaraṁ modalayina durgālu sādhiṁci siṁhyādriki viccēsi svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṭi dhātusaṁvatsara caitra ba 12 varāna sihyādrināthunni darśiṁci tama talli nāgā
dēvaṁmaṁgārikinni tama taṁḍri narasānāyaniṁgārikinni puṇyamugānu dēUniki samarpiṁcina kaṁṭhamāla 1 ki mutyālu 91 va
jramāṇikyāla kaḍiyāla jōḍu 1 śaṁkhacakrālapadakaṁ 1 paiḍi paḷeṁ 1 ki tūṁkālu ga 447�2 kānika māḍalu ga 2000 tama dēUḷu
ciṁnādēvammaṁgāricātanu samarpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu ga 500 tirumala dēvammaṁgāricātanu samarpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu
ga 500 Iṁtavaṭṭu samarpiṁcina dharmmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 6.1170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
